description: You are a Wind Energy Development Manager. The 'Security Audit' phase (Task ID 11) is being outsourced to 'SecuriCorp', a vendor who is only available to work on Tuesdays and Thursdays. Create a new calendar named 'SecuriCorp Schedule' configured with Tuesday and Thursday as the only working days. Assign this calendar to the 'Security Audit' task and export the project as a Microsoft Project XML file to /home/ga/Projects/vendor_schedule_project.xml.
